authority_boundary: This inventory records current role status, required files, capability gaps, and promotion blockers. It does NOT grant authority, approve activations, edit gates, enable automations, or override approval records. Every authority claim requires approval from the named approver in the role contract or this inventory's owner routing. Mechanical capability does not imply approved authority.

inventory_notes.scope_and_sources: This inventory records current Mindshare, Mojo, and Watch roles per roles.md (2026-06-21) mapped against autonomy-requirements.md and autonomy-backlog.json AUTO-003. Source pointers follow best-effort paths from roles.md directory.
inventory_notes.mechanical_vs_approved: Each record separates mechanical capability (tool access, file read/write) from approved authority (what a role is allowed to do at their current level). Tool availability does NOT imply approval to use. Every authority boundary requires Scott approval or domain-owner approval per the role contract.
inventory_notes.activation_status_meanings: draft = authorized for review, not operating; approved = authorized operator at current level; released-legacy = removed from active roster, historical context only. No approved status implies autonomy or agent runtime.
inventory_notes.autonomy_level_current_vs_target: Current level records actual operating status per roles.md. Target level reflects backlog intent (AUTO-003 through AUTO-027) but does NOT authorize progression. Each promotion requires eval execution, gap closure, owner signoffs, and explicit Scott approval per autonomy-requirements.md promotion review sequence.
inventory_notes.stop_conditions_and_gates: Every role has explicit stop conditions and approval gates. Stop conditions block all action if triggered. Approval gates block specific operations. Missing gate definitions is a gap.
inventory_notes.private_channels_not_inventoried: This inventory reads only roles.md roster and public role contracts. It does not read private channel contents, user-specific threads, or sensitive handoff channels. Private access control remains with each role owner.
inventory_notes.no_authority_grant: This inventory records status and gaps only. It does not grant authority, activate automation, edit gates, enable production action, or override Scott approval records. Every authority claim requires the approval source named in the role contract or approval gate.

approval_status: Created 2026-06-21; awaiting Scott and Ana approval per AUTO-003 proof requirements
